headline: Trump Wants To Guard Hormuz. The UAE Wants To Bypass It.
summary: Trump pledged to guard the Strait of Hormuz while the UAE is reportedly building around it. What it means for investors.

raw.headline: Trump Wants To Guard Hormuz. The UAE Wants To Bypass It.

headline: Jacobs secures three strategic UK National Highways contracts
summary: DALLAS, July 15, 2026--Jacobs is expanding its significant role in modernizing the U.K.'s infrastructure, securing three new commissions with National Highways.
